title: More (Item/Painting) Frame Variants (MStV+)
description: Item Frames and Painting Frames for every kind of wood
body: [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/a-los-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Stick-Variants/badge/requires-mstv.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-stick-variants) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Frame-Variants) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_top.svg) ## More Frame Variants Frames for Items, but also for Paintings, now coming in all wood types, so you can properly match your wall decor to your walls. ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/ehlsc.webp) A selection of the newly added **Painting** and (**Glow**) **Item Frame** variants. ### Adding 12 new _Paintings_1, 11 new _Item Frames_ and 11 new _Glow Item Frames_ to Minecraft. 1: Considering only vanilla, the amount of textures added are **286** (before 1.21) or **506** (in 1.21 with 20 new Vanilla Painting variants) or **552** (with 1.21.3's new Pale Oak Variants) or **564** (with 1.21.7's Dennis painting). ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/desc_hr_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/mk1eu.gif)**]()
